title: Rewards & Offers
content:
Program Overview

Agents should understand all three reward programs so they can answer client questions and identify which reward a client may be eligible for. All rewards are processed by the Lead — agents document the request and set expectations, but never grant rewards themselves.

Referral Bonus

When a client refers a friend to Tklesson and the friend completes their first paid session, the referrer earns one month of free Tklesson Premium access. There is no limit — each successful referral earns another month.

What to tell clients: They can find their referral link in their dashboard. The friend must sign up and complete a paid session for the bonus to apply. Premium access is granted after the friend's first session is confirmed.

Session Milestone Bonus

Students who complete 5 tutoring sessions earn one month of free Tklesson Premium access. Every additional set of 5 sessions earns another month. Premium includes advanced learning tools, extended messaging, priority scheduling, and more.

What to tell clients: The milestone is based on completed sessions, not scheduled sessions. After the fifth session is marked complete, the reward review is triggered. Clients should allow up to 24 hours for processing.

Annual Presentation Competition

Open to students who complete 12 or more sessions in the calendar year. Prizes are awarded on December 20th each year.

PlacePrize
🥇 1st Place$500
🥈 2nd Place$300
🥉 3rd Place$200

Details including the topic and submission guidelines are announced each fall. Eligible students are notified via email and dashboard. If a client asks about the competition outside of the fall announcement window, let them know details are coming and they'll be notified if eligible.

Agent Procedure — Reward Request

  1. Verify identity using standard three-question security checks.
  2. Confirm eligibility: For referrals — has the referred friend completed a paid session? For milestones — has the client completed 5 sessions? You can check session history in User Lookup.
  3. If the client does not have a Premium account: They must create one before the reward can be applied. Instruct them to sign up at the Premium dashboard using the same email address.
  4. Create a ticket under the Rewards category. Subject format: "[Reward Type] — client@email.com" (e.g., "5-Session Milestone — student@email.com" or "Referral Bonus — student@email.com").
  5. Set expectations: "Our Rewards team will review your account and respond within 24 hours via email. You'll hear from us either way."
  6. Leave the ticket open. The Lead handles verification, approval, and client communication. Once the Lead resolves the ticket, it moves to Resolved status.

Key Talking Points for Agents

  • "Let me check your account to confirm your eligibility."
  • "I've submitted your reward request. You'll receive an email within 24 hours with the outcome."
  • "Make sure you have a Tklesson Premium account set up — the reward is applied there."
  • Never promise a reward will be granted. Say "submitted for review," not "approved."
